_comment: Fields below are graded BY HAND after collection. null = not yet filled.
note: Highest cost of the Opus 4.8 runs despite near-identical work — Claude Code uses tighter, finer-grained turns (~120 vs ~30), so more per-turn thinking and cache reuse, not more or worse work.
selfVerificationNotes: Drove system Chrome headless via CDP against a local server with a smoke script that captured console output and screenshots: no JS/shader errors, canvas renders, 42,075 asteroids loaded. Also screenshotted search→select→detail and a deep link to confirm the visuals.
_grade: Marks: pass | good | partial | poor | fail | na | null(ungraded). See RUBRIC.md. Score computed by pnpm compile.
